title: Unsanitized frontmatter name enables path traversal in sync script
validation_reason: sync_microsoft_skills.py now sanitizes flat names and constrains delete/copy targets to safe in-repo paths.

title: Stored XSS via rehype-raw rendering of skill markdown
validation_reason: SkillDetail still renders markdown without rehype-raw; the reported stored-XSS path does not reproduce.

title: Symlink-following copy leaks host files in setup_web
validation_reason: setup_web.js now uses lstatSync plus resolveSafeRealPath() and skips out-of-root symlinks.

title: Insecure install guidance allows remote script execution
validation_reason: The Apify skill no longer recommends pipe-to-shell installs or token-on-command-line login.

title: setup_web.js now follows symlinks, enabling file exfiltration
validation_reason: Same root cause/fix area as finding 3.

title: Symlink traversal in web asset setup copies arbitrary files
validation_reason: Same root cause/fix area as finding 3.

title: Symlink file copying in .github/skills sync leaks host files
validation_reason: Microsoft sync now rejects unsafe symlink targets and only accepts safe regular files that stay within the cloned source root.

title: Symlinked file copy in Microsoft skill sync can leak host data
validation_reason: Same root cause/fix area as finding 7.

title: Committed Python bytecode can hide malicious logic
validation_reason: Tracked __pycache__ artifacts are absent on current main and repo hygiene tests fail if they reappear.

title: Symlinked SKILL.md can leak host files via index script
validation_reason: generate_index.py now ignores symlinked SKILL.md files during index generation.

title: Example loader trusts manifest paths, enabling file read
validation_reason: The Jetski loader rejects symlinked skill directories/files and any resolved SKILL.md outside the configured skills root.

title: TLS certificate verification disabled in new scrapers
validation_reason: TLS verification is enabled by default again; insecure behavior requires an explicit opt-out environment flag.

title: Complete bundle omits valid skill categories
validation_reason: The old helper-path omission still does not drive shipped bundle output; current bundles come from build-catalog.js.

title: Malformed frontmatter delimiter breaks YAML parsing for skills
validation_reason: The malformed --- Unknown frontmatter regression is no longer present in alpha-vantage.

title: ws_listener writes sensitive events to predictable /tmp files
validation_reason: ws_listener.py now defaults to a user-owned state directory and uses secure file creation.

title: Symlink traversal lets /skills/ serve arbitrary local files
validation_reason: refresh-skills-plugin.js resolves real paths under the skills root before serving /skills/*; the public Pages app no longer exposes the maintainer sync surface.

title: Sync Skills endpoint follows symlinks from downloaded archive
validation_reason: Same root cause/fix area as finding 16.

title: Validation crash if YAML frontmatter is not a mapping
validation_reason: validate_skills.py now rejects non-mapping YAML frontmatter cleanly instead of crashing downstream validation.

title: Anonymous Supabase writes allow skill star tampering
validation_reason: useSkillStars now stores saves locally in the browser and no longer performs shared frontend writes through the public Supabase client.

title: Metadata fixer overwrites symlinked SKILL.md targets
validation_reason: fix_skills_metadata.py now skips symlinked SKILL.md files and non-mapping frontmatter.

title: Installer now dereferences symlinks during copy
validation_reason: install.js now uses lstatSync plus resolveSafeRealPath() and skips symlinks that resolve outside the cloned repo root.

title: Installer merge path dereferences symlinks when copying
validation_reason: Same root cause/fix area as finding 21.

title: Cleanup sync deletes arbitrary paths via flat_name
validation_reason: Same root cause/fix area as finding 1.

title: Audio transcription example allows Python code injection
validation_reason: The audio transcription example now uses a quoted heredoc and passes values via environment variables.

title: Unbounded recursive skill traversal can crash catalog build
validation_reason: The claimed recursive symlink traversal in catalog discovery still does not reproduce on current code paths.

title: Release scripts still use root skills_index.json path
validation_reason: Root skills_index.json remains the canonical generated index, so the reported release-script path mismatch does not reproduce.

title: Symlink traversal in skill normalization allows file overwrite
validation_reason: skill-utils.js now relies on lstatSync-based safe directory/file discovery, so normalization does not treat symlinked skill folders as writable local skills.

title: last30days skill passes user input directly to Bash command
validation_reason: The last30days skill still passes user input as a quoted value through a temp file, so the reported direct shell-injection sink does not reproduce.

title: Unvalidated YAML frontmatter can crash index generation
validation_reason: Same root cause/fix area as finding 18.

title: Predictable /tmp counter file enables local file clobbering
validation_reason: The strategic compact hook now stores state under XDG_STATE_HOME instead of predictable shared /tmp paths.

title: Symlink traversal risk in new sync script
validation_reason: sync_recommended_skills.sh now preserves symlinks with cp -RP and avoids the destructive glob-delete pattern from the original report.

title: skills_manager allows path traversal in enable/disable operations
validation_reason: skills_manager.py now resolves candidate paths relative to the intended base directory and rejects traversal attempts.

title: Zip Slip risk in Office unpack scripts
validation_reason: The Office unpack helpers now validate archive members and reject traversal/symlink-style entries before extraction.
